sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_string String);
SELECT id, parseDateTime(date_string, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS parsed_date FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_string = '2023-10-03 14:45:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, formatDateTime(parseDateTime(date_string, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '%d-%m-%Y %H:%i') AS formatted_date FROM test_dates;
